channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 35A: rescue operation
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation. [On 31.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: rescue operation.
[On 31.05.2026]

item.title: 34A/N20: construction works
item.description: Because of construction works in the Prague Street area, the line 34A is redirected to June 03, 2026, approximately 17:00 clock. [09.04.2026 – 03.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Prague Street area, the line 34A is redirected to June 03, 2026, approximately 17:00 clock.
[09.04.2026 – 03.06.2026]

item.title: 43: track construction works
item.description: Due to track construction works in the Dornbacher Straße, the following change occurs with the 43 line. [20.04.2026 – 08.04.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Due to track construction works in the Dornbacher Straße, the following change occurs with the 43 line.
[20.04.2026 – 08.04.2027]

item.title: 11/71: track construction works
item.description: Due to track construction works in the Simmeringer Hauptstraße, short guides are available in the evening hours Monday to Friday at the line 11 and 71 (22:30-01:00). Period: From … [03.03.2026 – 27.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to track construction works in the Simmeringer Hauptstraße, short guides are available in the evening hours Monday to Friday at the line 11 and 71 (22:30-01:00). Period: From …
[03.03.2026 – 27.06.2026]

item.title: 46: track construction works
item.description: Because of track construction works in the Lerchenfelder Straße, the line 46 operating short-running becomes the line. [16.03.2026 – 11.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works in the Lerchenfelder Straße, the line 46 operating short-running becomes the line.
[16.03.2026 – 11.07.2026]

item.title: N81: track construction works
item.description: Because of track construction works on the Olympiaplatz, the N81 call bus line is being redirected. [05.05.2026 – 06.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Because of track construction works on the Olympiaplatz, the N81 call bus line is being redirected.
[05.05.2026 – 06.06.2026]

item.title: 7A: Antonsplatz
